privileged_info_summary: The task involves linking a vendor to a quality alert in an Odoo-based quality management system. All three metadata claims are verified: the target alert is named 'Surface Defects on Cabinet Batch' (created in setup_task.sh), the vendor to link is 'Wood Corner' (created or found in Odoo), and the related product is 'Cabinet with Doors' (created in setup_data.py). The data is entirely synthetic, created by initialization scripts that run before the agent task begins. No external data sources or real-world data are involved.
